mapper.select: select id, sort_order, name, url, description, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, delete_flag from osh_friend_link where delete_flag = 0 order by sort_order asc
mapper.update: update osh_friend_link set delete_flag = 1 where delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert:
insert into osh_friend_link (sort_order, name, url, description, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.sortOrder}, #{item.name}, #{item.url}, #{item.description}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy}, now(), now(), 0)
